title: centaurea micranthos
intro: Centaurea micranthos, also known as the Greek mountain centaury or mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea micranthos include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties, which can help to protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Centaurea micranthos can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
